task_completion.description: Create a 3.0 mm diameter circle centered 10.0 mm from the origin on the horizontal axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D sketch in SolveSpace showing a circle with a diameter constraint of 3.0 (or radius 1.5) and a distance constraint of 10.0 from the origin along an axis.

task_completion.description: Set the helix pitch to 6.0 mm and turns to 5.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace property browser or text window displays helix parameters with pitch '6.0' and turns '5.0'.

task_completion.description: Generate the 3D helical spring from the wire profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D coiled spring with 5 turns is visible in the SolveSpace workspace.

task_completion.description: Create a shape below Z=0 for Boolean subtraction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D shape (e.g., a rectangular box) is drawn below the XY plane (Z=0) overlapping the bottom of the spring, and the group is set to 'difference' or Boolean subtraction mode.

task_completion.description: Flatten the bottom of the spring by removing material below Z=0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom end of the 3D spring is visibly flat and cut exactly at the XY plane, indicating the Boolean subtraction was successfully applied.
The SolveSpace window title bar displays 'grounded_spring.slvs' or a save dialog/terminal confirms the file is saved in '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace interface with active drawing, constraint application, and parameter adjustments, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a python script or text editor to generate the .slvs file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running scripts or text editors open with raw .slvs file contents.

integrity.description: The model was built step-by-step rather than loaded from an existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate states like the 2D sketch, the unflattened helix, and the final flattened spring.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/grounded_spring.slvs. The wire diameter must be 3.0 mm, offset 10.0 mm, pitch 6.0 mm, and turns 5.0.
